controls.title: Commitment to integrity and ethical values
controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values through a code of conduct, ethics training, and a whistleblower channel. Management and the board set the tone at the top and hold individuals accountable for ethical behavior.

controls.title: Internal and external communication of security policies
controls.description: The entity communicates information security policies, standards, and procedures to personnel and relevant external parties on a regular basis. Training is provided to all employees annually.

controls.title: Logical access controls
controls.description: Access to information assets is restricted through authentication (MFA required), authorization, and role-based access control. Access is reviewed quarterly and deprovisioned within 24 hours of termination.

controls.title: Encryption of data in transit and at rest
controls.description: All customer data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher and at rest using AES-256. Encryption keys are managed via a key management system (KMS) with annual rotation.

controls.title: Vulnerability management and patching
controls.description: The entity identifies, prioritizes, and remediates vulnerabilities. Critical vulnerabilities are patched within 15 days, high within 30 days. Quarterly vulnerability scans and annual penetration tests are performed.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: All changes to production systems go through a formal change management process including code review, approval from an authorized party, automated testing, and documentation in a ticketing system.

controls.title: Security monitoring and incident detection
controls.description: The entity monitors security events using a SIEM, endpoint detection and response (EDR), and intrusion detection systems (IDS). Alerts are triaged by a 24/7 security operations center (SOC).

controls.title: Incident response plan
controls.description: A documented incident response plan defines roles, communication procedures, escalation paths, and post-incident review. The plan is tested annually via a tabletop exercise.

controls.title: Vendor and third-party risk management
controls.description: Third-party vendors who handle customer data undergo a security review including SOC 2 reports, data processing agreements, and annual reassessment.

controls.title: Backup and disaster recovery
controls.description: Customer data is backed up daily to a geographically redundant location. A disaster recovery plan with RTO of 4 hours and RPO of 1 hour is tested twice per year.
